name: Dibba Rotti
steps: Soak urad dal for 4 hours and grind to a thick, fluffy batter.
Mix in washed idli rava, cumin, green chillies, curry leaves and salt; rest 15 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep, heavy kadai and pour in the thick batter.
Cover and cook on the lowest flame until the bottom forms a deep golden, thick crust.
Flip once, cook briefly, and serve wedges hot with avakaya or ginger chutney.
